modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with installing and testing a USB webcam on Windows 10

full_description_text: 
So, the user is trying to get their new USB webcam up and running. They’re not sure how to install it or even test if it works. They’re on Windows 10 and just need some help figuring this out. It’s a bit confusing for them, and they want to make sure everything’s set up right.
short_description: Issues with installing and testing a USB webcam on Windows 10
description: So, the user is trying to get their new USB webcam up and running. They’re not sure how to install it or even test if it works. They’re on Windows 10 and just need some help figuring this out. It’s a bit confusing for them, and they want to make sure everything’s set up right.
